---
title: "A chat with Cifras&Conceptos"
author: "Andrés Gutiérrez"
date: "2014-03-15"
categories:
  - "Estadística"
---

[SoundCloud](https://api.soundcloud.com/tracks/139606598)

Did you hear about the

[successful prediction of the senate in Colombia](http://www.caracol.com.co/multimedia/graficos/los-aciertos-de-la-apuesta-de-cifras-y-conceptos-para-el-senado/20140310/recurso/2121117.aspx)

? Well, this was a very entertaining chat among some professors of the Faculty of Statistics of Universidad Santo Tomás and the statistical team of Cifras&Conceptos. This is just a chat; neither Universidad Santo Tomás nor I have any relationship with Cifras&Conceptos.
